title: Manufacturing Engineer - Samsung India Electronics - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Samsung India Electronics - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Samsung India Electronics are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Samsung India Electronics:
Samsung India Electronics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung India Electronics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
